mapper.select: select id as id, tenant_id as tenantId, name as name, active as active from tenant_projects where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by name asc
mapper.insert: insert into tenant_projects (id, tenant_id, name, active) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{name}, #{active}) on conflict (id) do update set tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, name = excluded.name, active = excluded.active
